scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.worker.min.mjs';const dst='public/pdf.worker.min.mjs';if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('PDF worker copied to /public');}else{console.warn('PDF worker not found, skipping copy');}"
